name: Sesame Cheese Crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine flour, salt, and cayenne pepper. Cut in the cold butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
2. Stir in the cheddar cheese and toasted sesame seeds.
3. Mix soy sauce with 3 tablespoons of ice-cold water to create a batter.
4. Gradually add the wet ingredients into the dry mixture, mixing lightly until the dough begins to stick together. If needed, add more ice-cold water, a little at a time.
5. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and press it into an even layer on a lightly floured board or pastry cloth.
6. Roll the dough to 1/8 inch thickness using a rolling pin.
7. Cut the rolled dough into 2 x 1-inch rectangles with a knife or pastry wheel.
8. Place the crackers on lightly greased baking sheets.
9. Bake at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C) for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Remove from the oven and allow the crackers to cool on a wire rack.
